title: Fall In Love With You
html: Intro: D9 Em7 G A9 (3x) D9 Em7 G D9 A9 Bm7 G Hold my hand D9 A9 Bm7 G Lead me beyond the river D9 A9 Bm7 G Your blood has made me pure D9 A9 Bm7 G Lead me to your presence Bridge: D9 Em7 G A9 D9 Em7 G Bm7 A9 I come running to you G A9 I wanna take hold of you Bm7 A9 Em7 G Pour out my love over you, Jesus Bm7 A9 I wanna capture your gaze G A9 Give you all of my praise Bm7 A9 Em7 I worship you with all of my strength G More and more and more D A9 Em7 G I want to fall in love with you, Jesus D A9 Em7 G And throw myself into your arms, Jesus A9 Beloved Jesus Solo: Bm7 G Bm7 C Bm7 G Em7 G G G A
